name: production-candidate-evidence-manifest
description: R2 production candidate evidence manifest. Local bounded evidence is required; fixed-runner/pre-production entries become required only when check_production_evidence_manifest.py is run with --require-fixed-runner.

evidence.title: R0 production candidate aggregate evidence
evidence.notes: Aggregates fixed-runner preflight, P5/P6, N5, optional N4 TLS full-flow, and optional N6 decision evidence.

evidence.title: R0 SDK enterprise delivery child summary
R0 transport config governance with TLS full-flow
R0 N6 gRPC PoC decision child summary
R1 TLS production readiness evidence
evidence.notes: Covers TLS full-flow, server CA verification, certificate rotation, mismatched CA expected failure, and plain-vs-TLS smoke comparison.

evidence.title: Long-soak and capacity evidence batch
evidence.notes: N1 fixed-runner evidence producer for 2h/8h soak and capacity baseline. Final approval should include at least 2h soak plus capacity; 8h soak is recommended before high-risk releases.

evidence.title: Fixed-runner release/capacity baseline evidence
evidence.notes: R4 validates release baseline, capacity profile, and business-capacity evidence. Prefer fixed low-noise performance runner output before final production approval.

evidence.title: Pre-production Docker/K8s recovery drill evidence
evidence.notes: R5 produces a Docker Compose gateway restart drill summary when Docker is available; staging/prod records should reuse the same drill record schema.

evidence.title: TLS pre-production multi-run evidence
evidence.notes: R6 runs multiple TLS readiness passes and aggregates rotation, expected failure, and plain-vs-TLS overhead evidence.
